connectedToApp.message: The browser extension is connected to the app
connectedToApp.description: Indicates that the extension is connected to the main installed OneKeePass app

noDbAvailable.message: Please open a browser connection enabled database and then try

noMatchingEntry.message: No matching entry is found for this login url in any of the opened databases
noMatchingEntry.description: No matching entry is found for the url

appIsNotRunning.message: There is no connection to the locally installed app. The app may not be running. Please start the app and then reconnect
appIsNotRunning.description: The main app should be running for the browser extension to work
